name: Lindsay Australia Limited
analysis: LAU has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.5850, stop A$0.5445, target A$0.6660 (2.00:1) — then trail it.
